subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-21
subcodes.first_line: I desire to say farewell today as I am going to leave in a few hours. But I do not say goodby. I repeat "Au revoir".
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @power of the Manifestation of God
